title: JetWhale Host Plugin Manifest
description: Manifest file for a JetWhale host plugin JAR. Place at META-INF/jetwhale/plugin-manifest.json. A single JAR may declare multiple plugins.

plugins.description: The plugins declared by this JAR. Each entry names its own factory class, so one JAR can provide several plugins.

pluginId.description: Unique identifier for the plugin (e.g. com.example.myplugin).

pluginName.description: Human-readable display name of the plugin.

factoryClass.description: Fully-qualified name of this plugin's JetWhaleHostPluginFactory implementation (e.g. com.example.MyPluginFactory). The host loads and instantiates it from the JAR.

requiresAgent.description: Whether this plugin needs an agent counterpart. true (default): available only for sessions whose agent advertised this pluginId. false: host-only (no agent, no messaging), instantiated for every active session.

agentVersionRange.description: Specifies the range of agent plugin versions this host plugin is compatible with. Omit to allow all agent versions.

min.description: Minimum compatible agent version (inclusive). Null means no lower bound.

max.description: Maximum compatible agent version (inclusive). Null means no upper bound.

icon.description: Icon paths relative to the JAR root.

activePath.description: Path to the icon used when the plugin is active.

inactivePath.description: Path to the icon used when the plugin is inactive.
